body.title: /sorted: call advisor() for L/XL ticket drafts before filing
body.result: Step 3.5 added to /sorted: advisor() called for L/XL drafts before /audit-ticket; invariant added to Invariants section; synced to ~/.claude/skills/
body.intention: I intend that L/XL ticket drafts in /sorted have advisor-reviewed completion criteria before they reach the queue.
body.description:
**Problem:** /sorted drafts L/XL tickets without advisor review; completion criteria gaps survive to the queue and surface only at sprint time (reset cycles).

**Proposed shape:** In /sorted Step 3 flow, after drafting an L/XL ticket and before /audit-ticket: call advisor() with the draft ticket as context; apply any feedback (especially to completion criteria and scope boundaries). One conditional block in the skill text. Skip for S tickets (overhead > benefit).

**Affected files:** skills/sorted.md

**Design rules:** Sonnet drives, Opus advisor at decision points (D-ticket-quality-verification-loop-2026-06-06). Never call advisor() for S-ticket batches.

**Scope boundary:** Skill text edit only — no code changes.

**Completion criteria:** skills/sorted.md contains an explicit step calling advisor() for L/XL drafts before /audit-ticket; next L/XL ticket filed via /sorted shows advisor() call in transcript; feedback is applied before the ticket reaches cc_queue.
